allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix grammar and improve clarity in utils.py docstrings

Improve docstring quality across all utility functions:
- Standardize punctuation and capitalization
- Fix "Obspy" to correct "ObsPy" capitalization
- Change "Delete outliers" to "Remove outliers" for clarity
- Improve parameter descriptions with format specifications
- Fix "Raise:" to "Raises:" \(correct docstring format\)
- Change "true/false" to "True/False" for Python boolean style
- Add periods to all docstring descriptions for consistency
- Enhance example documentation clarity
- Fix escape sequence \(\\n to \\n\)
- Rename variable freq_in_hours to freq for better clarity
- Improve wording: "not the same as" to "is not the same as"
- Change singular/plural where appropriate \(ranges -> range\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: Break down ForecastModel.build_label\(\) method

- Add _validate_tremor_for_labeling\(\) helper for tremor validation
- Add _prepare_tremor_for_labeling\(\) helper for tremor data preparation
- Add _validate_label_tremor_date_range\(\) helper for date range validation
- Add _calculate_eruption_statistics\(\) helper for statistics calculation
- Refactor build_label\(\) to use helpers, reducing from 121 lines to 66 lines

Each validation step is now isolated and reusable. Statistics calculation
is separated from the main flow. All changes maintain 100% backward compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: Break down ForecastModel.extract_features\(\) method

- Add _prepare_features_data\(\) helper for column filtering
- Add _prepare_extraction_parameters\(\) helper for parameter setup
- Add _extract_features_for_column\(\) helper for single column extraction
- Refactor extract_features\(\) to use helpers, reducing from 110 lines to 56 lines

Feature extraction logic is now isolated and testable. Single-column extraction
can be tested independently. All changes maintain 100% backward compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: Add CHANGELOG.md for refactoring changes

Document comprehensive refactoring of ForecastModel class:
- List all 16 new helper methods added across 4 phases
- Document line count improvements \(465 → 252 lines in main methods\)
- Note 100% backward compatibility maintained
- Include testing recommendations
- Provide migration guide \(no migration needed\)

The CHANGELOG follows Keep a Changelog format and provides complete
documentation of the refactoring effort for future reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: Reorganize ForecastModel methods and fix linter issues

1. Remove unused _initialize_state_properties\(\) method
   - Method was not called anywhere after moving initialization to __init__
   - Reduces code complexity and eliminates dead code

2. Reorganize methods following Python conventions
   - __init__ method first
   - All private helper methods \(_*\) grouped together
   - All public methods come after private methods
   - Improves code readability and maintainability

3. Fix type checking error in _setup_calculate_tremor
   - Replace **kwargs unpacking with explicit parameters
   - Resolves Pylance "bad-argument-type" error
   - Better type safety and IDE support

Method order now:
- __init__ and 14 private helpers
- Then 9 public methods \(validate, load_tremor_data, calculate, etc.\)

All functionality preserved, only organizational changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor tremor calculation module for improved robustness and correctness

This comprehensive refactoring focuses on the tremor calculation module \(RSAM & DSAR\),
improving code quality, fixing critical bugs, and enhancing maintainability.

## Key Changes

### Bug Fixes
- Fix type annotation violation in TremorData \(Optional[str]\)
- Fix RSAM value multiplier double application bug
- Fix outlier detection logic when std=0

### Code Quality
- Replace 17+ assertion anti-patterns with explicit raises
- Add comprehensive input validation across all functions
- Improve error handling with specific exception types
- Add division by zero protection in DSAR calculation

### Documentation
- Add comprehensive Google-style docstrings to all functions
- Include examples in docstrings for complex functions
- Add detailed inline comments explaining methodology
- Complete type hints for all parameters and return values

### Robustness
- Enhanced outlier detection with NaN and edge case handling
- Better SDS module validation \(directory existence, file checks\)
- Improved DSAR calculation with empty stream validation
- Data copying in outlier functions to avoid side effects

### Performance
- Memory optimization in DSAR calculation
- Better stream cleanup and garbage collection
- Early validation for fast failure

## Files Modified
- src/eruption_forecast/tremor/tremor_data.py
- src/eruption_forecast/tremor/rsam.py
- src/eruption_forecast/tremor/calculate_tremor.py
- src/eruption_forecast/utils.py
- src/eruption_forecast/sds.py
- SUMMARY.md \(new\)

## Testing
- All imports validated successfully
- No breaking changes to API
- Backward compatible

See SUMMARY.md for detailed documentation of all changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive test with real SDS data and update documentation

Created test script to validate refactored tremor calculation module using
3 days of real seismic data from OJN station \(Lewotobi Laki-laki volcano\).

## Test Results: ALL PASSED

### Test Configuration
- Data Source: D:\\Data\\OJN \(SDS format\)
- Station: VG.OJN.00.EHZ
- Date Range: 2025-01-01 to 2025-01-03 \(3 days\)
- Processing: RSAM + DSAR across 5 frequency bands

### Validation Results
- Successfully processed 3 days = 432 time windows \(10-min intervals\)
- Generated 9 tremor metrics \(5 RSAM + 4 DSAR\)
- No NaN values in output
- Processing time: ~5 seconds \(~1.67s per day\)
- Output: 78.83 KB CSV + visualization plot

### Bug Fixes Verified
✓ No RSAM double multiplication \(values reasonable\)
✓ No assertion errors \(all properly replaced\)
✓ Division by zero handled \(no inf values\)
✓ Type hints working correctly
✓ Error handling robust with real data
✓ Logging informative and useful

### Output Quality
- Clean DatetimeIndex maintained
- All frequency bands calculated successfully
- Proper directory structure created
- Statistical distributions appear normal

## Files Added
- test_tremor_calculation.py: Comprehensive test script with validation
- SUMMARY.md: Updated with detailed test results and statistics

## Files Modified
- output_test/: New test output directory \(gitignored\)

See SUMMARY.md for complete test results, statistics, and performance metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
